description_long: This is a compact, single-story house with a simple rectangular footprint and a steeply pitched gable roof. The exterior walls are finished in a light color, likely stucco or painted concrete, and the roof is a uniform gray, suggesting metal or composite shingles. The front facade features a central wooden door with a decorative arch and two symmetrically placed windows with brown frames. The side elevations each have a single window, while the rear has a single window centered on the wall. The house has no visible porch, steps, or decorative trim, giving it a clean and functional appearance. The windows are double-paned and divided by muntins, adding a touch of traditional style.
description: A small, single-story house with a steep gable roof, light-colored walls, and symmetrical windows flanking a central wooden door. The design is simple and functional, with minimal decorative elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the central wooden door and two symmetrically placed windows with brown frames.
description_view_1: Side view displaying the steep gable roof and a single window centered on the wall.
description_view_2: Rear view with a single window centered on the back wall, no door or additional features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view with two windows, mirroring the window arrangement of the front but without a door.
attribute_entryway_design: Central wooden door with a decorative arch, no porch or steps, flanked by two windows.
